Main.message: Welcome to the Principality of Andorra, a country with an area of 468 square kilometers
Andorra has two borders: Spain
Andorra has two borders: Spain and France
Andorra has 7 parishes
Andorra has 7 parishes: Canillo
Andorra has 7 parishes: Encamp
Andorra has 7 parishes: Ordino
Andorra has 7 parishes: La Massana
Andorra has 7 parishes: Andorra la Vella
Andorra has 7 parishes: Sant Julià de Lòria
Andorra has 7 parishes: Escaldes-Engordany
Our roads: <color=#FF0000>Primary </color> Download the Andorra map PDF at point 7 in the room
Our roads: <color=#FF0000>Primary </color>and <color=#FFCC00>Secondary</color> Download the Andorra map PDF at point 7 in the room
Scattered across our Principality's geography, there are more than 80 lakes and ponds of various sizes
Valira del Nord River
Valira d'Orient River
La Valira River
Andorra, the country of endless peaks: more than 50 summits challenging 2,000 meters, with <color=#FF8C66>Comapedrosa </color>leading at 2,942!
Discover the 6 peaks of Ordino with unique ridge lines! Download the PDF map at point 7 in the room
